description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The Instance follows the general ERC4626 procedures see [A.6.1.1.1.2.6.1.2.2.1.2.1.2.2 - ERC-4626 Functions](e386a0df-9e0b-4ffd-9879-49131f795b0b) and for emergency procedures see [A.6.1.1.1.2.6.1.2.2.3.4.1 - ERC-4626 Withdrawal Action](f92ddc3f-672a-4f52-931f-5263a9f709b9). For detailed example of the

interaction logic for depositing to, withdrawing from, and redeeming from this ERC4626 vault instance see [A.6.1.1.1.2.6.1.3.1.5.1.3.1 - Deposit ERC-4626 Tokens](e2ad525b-3f3f-4402-9e4d-3ae125b35b76) and [A.6.1.1.1.2.6.1.3.1.5.1.3.2 - Withdraw ERC-4626 Tokens](caa295f4-92f4-4ca9-9083-2a1b94c70d5f).

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
